cleaning_decisions.duplicate_removal: Removed exact duplicate reviews based on text content
cleaning_decisions.empty_removal: Removed reviews with empty or null text
cleaning_decisions.special_characters: Removed all non-alphanumeric characters except spaces
cleaning_decisions.number_handling: Converted common numbers (0-10) to text, removed others
cleaning_decisions.whitespace: Normalized multiple spaces to single space
cleaning_decisions.stopwords: Removed English stop words using NLTK stopwords corpus
cleaning_decisions.lemmatization: Applied WordNet lemmatization to all tokens
cleaning_decisions.minimum_cleaned_length: Required at least 3 words after cleaning

limitations: The app had 67,655 total reviews available, but only the first 5,000 were saved as required.
Some numeric meaning may be lost during number-to-text conversion.
Emoji and special character removal may slightly alter user sentiment.
